prerequisites: A Lemlist account whose plan and role permit API access (the vendor docs note that some account types do not support API integrations, and you must be an admin or have API access permissions).
A Lemlist API key generated from Settings, Integrations. The key is shown only once at creation, so copy and store it immediately.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the single `api_key` secret field. Lemlist uses HTTP Basic authentication where the username (login) is always empty and the password is your API key. The colon-prefixed string `:YourApiKey` is Base64 encoded and sent in the `Authorization: Basic <encoded>` header. The connector handles this encoding for you once you provide the key.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Lemlist API key
setupSteps.body: In the Lemlist app, click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner and open Settings, then go to Integrations. Click Generate, give the key a descriptive name (for example a label identifying this integration), and click Create Key. Copy the key immediately, as Lemlist displays it only once. If you lose it you must generate a new one.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key in the required `api_key` field. This is the only credential the connector needs. Lemlist API requests are sent to `https://api.lemlist.com/api/` using HTTP Basic auth (empty username, API key as password), which the connector builds from this value.

sources.title: Find and use the lemlist API (Lemlist Help Center)
